sentences.target: Sois prudent en traversant la rue.

translations.fr: Sois prudent en traversant la rue.
translations.en: Be careful when crossing the street.
translations.es: Ten cuidado al cruzar la calle.
translations.de: Sei vorsichtig, wenn du die Straße überquerst.
translations.it: Fai attenzione quando attraversi la strada.
translations.pt: Tenha cuidado ao atravessar a rua.
translations.vi: Hãy cẩn thận khi băng qua đường.
translations.nl: Wees voorzichtig als je de straat oversteekt.
translations.hu: Légy óvatos, amikor átmész az utcán.
translations.hi: सड़क पार करते समय सावधान रहें.
translations.el: Να είσαι προσεκτικός όταν περνάς τον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Vær forsiktig når du krysser veien.
translations.sv: Var försiktig när du korsar gatan.
translations.da: Vær forsigtig, når du krydser vejen.
translations.ja: 道を渡るときは気をつけてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative (2nd person singular) of être used as a copula; addresses an implicit subject 'tu' and links to the predicative adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complement of the copula 'Sois' describing the subject; default masculine form.
Preposition introducing a gerund construction; marks simultaneity ('while').
Present participle used as a gerund (VerbForm=Ger); subject is controlled by the main clause (same as 'tu'); forms the adverbial phrase 'en traversant'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'rue' as the direct object of 'traversant'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the gerund 'traversant'.

sentences.target: Elle reste prudente avec ses économies.

translations.fr: Elle reste prudente avec ses économies.
translations.en: She stays cautious with her savings.
translations.es: Ella es cuidadosa con sus ahorros.
translations.de: Sie geht vorsichtig mit ihren Ersparnissen um.
translations.it: È prudente con i suoi risparmi.
translations.zh-Hans: 她对自己的存款很谨慎。
translations.yue: 佢對自己嘅儲蓄好謹慎。
translations.ru: Она осторожно обращается со своими сбережениями.
translations.pt: Ela é cuidadosa com suas economias.
translations.vi: Cô ấy thận trọng với tiền tiết kiệm của mình.
translations.nl: Ze is voorzichtig met haar spaargeld.
translations.hi: वह अपनी बचत के साथ सावधान रहती है.
translations.pl: Ona ostrożnie obchodzi się ze swoimi oszczędnościami.
translations.el: Είναι προσεκτική με τις αποταμιεύσεις της.
translations.nb: Hun er forsiktig med sparepengene sine.
translations.sv: Hon är försiktig med sina besparingar.
translations.ro: Ea este atentă cu economiile ei.
translations.da: Hun er forsigtig med sin opsparing.
translations.ja: 彼女は貯金を慎重に管理しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; denotes continuing state and takes a predicative complement.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'Elle' and functions as a predicative complement to 'reste'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; plural form agreeing with 'économies'; possessor is 'Elle'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Nous sommes prudents en conduisant sous la pluie.
sentences.reading: /nu sɔm pʁy.dɑ̃ ɑ̃ kɔ̃.dɥi.zɑ̃ su la plɥi/

translations.fr: Nous sommes prudents en conduisant sous la pluie.
translations.ipa: /nu sɔm pʁy.dɑ̃ ɑ̃ kɔ̃.dɥi.zɑ̃ su la plɥi/
translations.en: We are careful when driving in the rain.
translations.es: Conducimos con cuidado bajo la lluvia.
translations.it: Guidiamo con prudenza sotto la pioggia.
translations.ko: 비 오는 날 운전할 때 우리는 조심해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 下雨天开车时我们很小心。
translations.yue: 落雨時我哋揸車會好小心。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cẩn thận khi lái xe dưới mưa.
translations.ar: نكون حذرين عند القيادة في المطر.
translations.nl: We rijden voorzichtig in de regen.
translations.hi: बारिश में गाड़ी चलाते समय हम सावधान रहते हैं.
translations.pl: Jesteśmy ostrożni, gdy prowadzimy w deszczu.
translations.el: Είμαστε προσεκτικοί όταν οδηγούμε στη βροχή.
translations.nb: Vi er forsiktige når vi kjører i regn.
translations.id: Kami berhati-hati saat mengemudi ketika hujan.
translations.ro: Suntem atenți când conducem pe ploaie.
translations.cs: Jsme opatrní při řízení za deště.
translations.da: Vi er forsigtige, når vi kører i regn.
translations.ja: 雨の中を運転するときは注意しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of être used as a copula; links to the predicative adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine plural; agrees with 'Nous' and serves as the complement of the copula 'sommes'.
Preposition introducing a gerund construction ('en conduisant'); marks simultaneity.
Present participle used as gerund (VerbForm=Ger); subject control by 'Nous'; forms an adverbial phrase modifying the main predicate.
Preposition introducing a spatial/locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Je préfère être prudent avec mon budget.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁe.fɛʁ ɛtʁ pʁy.dɑ̃ a.vɛk mɔ̃ byd.ʒɛ/

translations.fr: Je préfère être prudent avec mon budget.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁe.fɛʁ ɛtʁ pʁy.dɑ̃ a.vɛk mɔ̃ byd.ʒɛ/
translations.en: I prefer to be careful with my budget.
translations.es: Prefiero tener cuidado con mi presupuesto.
translations.de: Ich bin lieber vorsichtig mit meinem Budget.
translations.it: Preferisco stare attento al mio budget.
translations.zh-Hans: 我更愿意在预算上谨慎一些。
translations.yue: 我寧願對自己嘅預算謹慎啲。
translations.ru: Я предпочитаю осторожно обращаться со своим бюджетом.
translations.pt: Prefiro ter cuidado com meu orçamento.
translations.he: אני מעדיף להיות זהיר עם התקציב שלי.
translations.tr: Bütçem konusunda dikkatli olmayı tercih ederim.
translations.vi: Tôi thích cẩn thận với ngân sách của mình.
translations.ar: أفضل أن أكون حذرًا مع ميزانيتي.
translations.nl: Ik ben liever voorzichtig met mijn budget.
translations.uk: Я волію бути обережним зі своїм бюджетом.
translations.hi: मैं अपने बजट के साथ सावधान रहना पसंद करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Wolę być ostrożny ze swoim budżetem.
translations.el: Προτιμώ να είμαι προσεκτικός με τον προϋπολογισμό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg foretrekker å være forsiktig med budsjettet mitt.
translations.id: Saya lebih suka berhati-hati dengan anggaran saya.
translations.sv: Jag föredrar att vara försiktig med min budget.
translations.ro: Prefer să fiu atent cu bugetul meu.
translations.cs: Raději jsem opatrný se svým rozpočtem.
translations.da: Jeg foretrækker at være forsigtig med mit budget.
translations.ja: 自分の予算は慎重に管理したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive of être used as a copula within the infinitival clause complement to 'préfère'; links to the predicative adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complement of the copula 'être'; controlled subject is 'Je'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular agreeing with 'budget'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'avec'.
